phase_0.boundary_condition: The Magic Circle and the structural constraints of the 12-primitive tuple

VINIT.justification: The void state before the grimoire is read or the circle cast.

TANCH.justification: The hermetic boundary that contains the operational space and separates it from the profane.

AFWD.justification: The forward morphism of the spoken word that calls the spirit into the triangle.

AREV.justification: The reverse morphism that releases the spirit and reverses the invocation.

CLINK.justification: The sequential chaining of purification, invocation, binding, and command.

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-referential loop where the text reads the operator and the operator is the instrument.

FSPLIT.justification: The Frobenius instrument that splits the operation into Binding (Summoning) and Releasing (Banishing).

FFUSE.justification: The reconstitution of the unified authority, where the seal that binds is exactly the seal that frees.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state where the spirit appears in the triangle and obeys the conjuration.

EVALF.justification: The negative state where the spirit refuses, the circle is breached, or the operator's purity fails.

ENGAGR.justification: The simultaneous holding of the unlicensed spirit and the HGA, a structural tension without resolution (e.g., Crowley's Boleskine state).

IFIX.justification: The permanent, append-only record of the grimoire's 12-primitive fingerprint in the Ars Majikus.

phase_3.void_description: The uninitiated state, before the grimoire is opened or the circle cast.
phase_3.true_description: The spirit manifests in the triangle and submits to the operator's command.
phase_3.false_description: The conjuration fails, the circle is breached, or the spirit refuses to appear.
phase_3.both_description: The O_infinity paradice, where the operator holds the unbanished spirit and the divine authority simultaneously, a structural tension held without resolution.

steps.domain_action: The uninitiated operator approaches the grimoire in a state of void.
The 9-foot Magic Circle is cast, establishing the hermetic boundary.
The Conjuration is spoken, a forward morphism calling the spirit into the triangle.
The Seal of Solomon is deployed, branching the operation into Binding and Releasing.
The spirit manifests in the triangle and submits to the conjuration (T-arm).
The sequential chaining of the spirit's office to the operator's will.
The spirit refuses or the operator's purity fails, breaching the circle (F-arm).
The reverse morphism of the License to Depart or the collapse of the rite.
The Frobenius closure (μ∘δ = id) is realized, reconstituting the unified authority.
The paradice of the unbanished spirit and the HGA held simultaneously without resolution.
The operator realizes they are the instrument; the text reads the reader (O_infinity).
The structural fingerprint of the operation is permanently fixed in the grimoire's taxonomy.
The terminal closure of the circle, sealing the operation and containing the system.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Grimoire Text (The User Manual for structural technology)
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The Divine Names and Sigils (Resonant frequencies that bridge domains)
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Eternal Chirality (The operation remembers every prior invocation and operator)
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Planetary Hours and Lunar Phases (Astrological timing constraints)
phase_5.alfs_store: The Testament of Solomon (The Ur-Template, O_infinity, the only grimoire that achieves full closure)

phase_6.cycle_cost: The operator's intentional coherence and spiritual purity (consumed as noise reduction)
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The uninitiated operator and the profane space.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The transformed operator (O_infinity) and the sealed operational space.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The Frobenius closure (μ∘δ = id) ensures that the energy of summoning is perfectly balanced by the energy of banishing, conserving the structural integrity of the system.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → CLINK → EVALF → AREV → FFUSE → ENGAGR → IMSCRIB → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: ob3ect_sequence
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(3, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑾  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑡 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑠  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [10] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑳 → 𐑭  | identity — self-imscription
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑠 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The uninitiated operator approaches the grimoire in a state of void.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The 9-foot Magic Circle is cast, establishing the hermetic boundary.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑚)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The Conjuration is spoken, a forward morphism calling the spirit into the tri...)
  -- FSPLIT [3] (gran := 𐑚) (The Seal of Solomon is deployed, branching the operation into Binding and Releasing.) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The spirit manifests in the triangle and submits to the conjuration (T-arm).)
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The sequential chaining of the spirit's office to the operator's will.)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The spirit refuses or the operator's purity fails, breaching the circle (F-arm).)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The reverse morphism of the License to Depart or the collapse of the rite.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The Frobenius closure (μ∘δ = id) is realized, reconstituting the unified authority.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [9] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The paradice of the unbanished spirit and the HGA held simultaneously without...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑳 𐑭)  -- [10] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The operator realizes they are the instrument; the text reads the reader (O_i...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The structural fingerprint of the operation is permanently fixed in the grimo...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The terminal closure of the circle, sealing the operation and containing the ...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (ob3ect_sequence_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (ob3ect_sequence_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem ob3ect_sequence_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
